item.ptxt: When cleaning the glass, wipe it in the direction of the wire with a soft, dry cloth. Take care not to damage the wire. Do not use detergents or glass cleaners with abrasive ingredients.
When measuring voltage, wrap a piece of tin foil around the tip of the negative probe and press the foil against the wire with your finger, as shown in the illustration.

s2.ptxt: Check the voltage at the center of each wire, as shown in the illustration.
Clean the broken wire tips with a grease, wax and silicone remover.
Place masking tape along both sides of the wire to be repaired.
Thoroughly mix the repair agent (Dupont paste No. 4817 or equivalent).
Using a fine tip brush, apply a small amount of the repair agent to the wire.
After a few minutes, remove the masking tape.
